title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a marketplace feature for Archon that enables sharing and discovery of battle-tested AI coding workflows. Users can install YAML-based workflows from a centralized app store that run in isolated git worktrees with any model provider.
